Event: Cornucopia Island April 2026

Sage Bot Item Code: RI322


Other locations the gear can be found
Cornucopia Adventurer Challenge
Celestial Tear Ring

Once in a while, the unit casts decay upon the armor of 3 random enemy units. When their armor is decayed, the enemy units receive 343800 pure damage, and their magical armor is reduced by 30% for 4 sec. These enemy units also receive 406300 magic damage for 4 sec.

When the ring's wearer casts decay, they also steal 20% of all stats from the target and all enemy units in a small radius around for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. Triggers at most once per 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
